skills.name: angular-component
skills.description: Create modern Angular standalone components following v20+ best practices. Use for building UI components with signal-based inputs/outputs, OnPush change detection, host bindings, content projection, and lifecycle hooks.

skills.name: angular-routing
skills.description: Implement routing in Angular v20+ applications with lazy loading, functional guards, resolvers, and route parameters. Use for navigation setup, protected routes, route-based data loading, and nested routing.

skills.name: angular-rxjs-patterns
skills.description: Use when handling async operations in Angular applications with observables, operators, and subjects.

skills.name: angular-signals
skills.description: Implement signal-based reactive state management in Angular v20+. Use for creating reactive state with signal(), derived state with computed(), dependent state with linkedSignal(), and side effects with effect().

skills.name: clean-code
skills.description: Applies principles from Robert C. Martin's 'Clean Code'. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring code to ensure high quality, readability, and maintainability. Covers naming, functions, comments, formatting and error handling.

skills.name: cyberpunk-theme
skills.description: Design system real del proyecto Inter AUU / CV Inter. Paleta neón, tipografías Orbitron + Inter, efectos cyberpunk (scanlines CRT, glow, flicker, pulse), glassmorphism y overrides de PrimeNG/FilePond. Tiene precedencia sobre frontend-design para cualquier cambio visual del repo.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use when building web components, pages, dashboards or styling any web UI. Generates polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

skills.name: git-commit
skills.description: Execute git commit + push with conventional commit message in Spanish, project-specific scopes, HEREDOC format, and Co-Authored-By footer. Use when the user asks to commit changes or mentions "/commit". Always pushes to remote after commit unless user says otherwise.

skills.name: nodejs-backend-patterns
skills.description: Build production-ready Node.js backend services with Express/Fastify, implementing middleware patterns, error handling, authentication, database integration, and API design best practices.

skills.name: prisma-expert
skills.description: Prisma ORM expert for schema design, migrations, query optimization, relations modeling, and database operations. Use PROACTIVELY for Prisma schema issues, migration problems and query performance.

skills.name: responsive-design
skills.description: Implement modern responsive layouts using container queries, fluid typography, CSS Grid, and mobile-first breakpoint strategies. Use when building adaptive interfaces or creating component-level responsive behavior.

skills.name: typescript-advanced-types
skills.description: Master TypeScript's advanced type system including generics, conditional types, mapped types, template literals, and utility types for building type-safe applications.

skills.name: vitest
skills.description: Vitest fast unit testing framework powered by Vite with Jest-compatible API. Use when writing tests, mocking, configuring coverage, or working with test filtering and fixtures.
skills.author: Anthony Fu

skills.name: writing-skills
skills.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment.

skills.name: reborn-mentor
skills.description: Use when the user invokes /Reborn, mentions Reborn.
